mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_review(order_id, reviewer_id, reviewee_id, rating, content) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{reviewerId}, #{revieweeId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trade_review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}
SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reviewer_nickname FROM trade_review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId}
